heading: Relation to other provisions
label: 6806 Relation to other provisions
text: Except for the amendments made by subsections (a) and (b), nothing in this chapter shall be construed to modify, limit, or supersede the operation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act [ et seq.], and no inference shall be drawn on the basis of the provisions of this chapter regarding whether information is transaction or experience information under section 603 of such Act [].15 U.S.C. 168115 U.S.C. 1681a
notes: References in TextAmendments made by subsections (a) and (b), referred to in text, means amendments made by section 506(a) and (b) of , which amended .Pub.
